Package com.societegenerale.failover.store.async

package com.societegenerale.failover.store.async
Non-blocking write decorator for FailoverStore.

FailoverStoreAsync wraps a delegate store and offloads its mutating operations (store, delete, cleanByExpiry) to a virtual-thread TaskExecutor so they never block the request thread; find stays synchronous. Enabled by default (failover.store.async=true) and assembled as the outermost decorator of the store chain.

  • Class
    Description
    BoundedTaskExecutor
    TaskExecutor decorator that bounds the number of concurrently in-flight tasks and applies a RejectionPolicy when that bound is reached — a back-pressure / overload guard (audit R-2).
    FailoverStoreAsync<T>
    FailoverStore decorator that offloads write operations (FailoverStoreAsync.store(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.delete(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.cleanByExpiry(java.time.Instant)) to a TaskExecutor, keeping the calling thread unblocked.
    RejectionPolicy
    What a BoundedTaskExecutor does with a task submitted while it is at its concurrency limit.
